hooks.command: grep -qE '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*\.claude/' && echo 'temper-managed projection: .claude/ is projected from the .temper/ surface — a direct edit here is drift; edit the owning .temper/ module or document and re-run temper emit. This guard binds only Claude Code writes; other tools writes are not bound by it.' >&2; exit 0
